name: Fruit Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
PER SERVING: 87 calories, 5g Protein, 16g Carbohydrates, 0g fat, 3mg Cholesterol, 81 Sodium
Combine the chilled fruit cocktail and remaining ingredients in a blender container. Cover and blend until smooth. Add ice cubes and continue blending until desired consistency is reached. Sprinkle with additional cinnamon for garnish if desired. Serve immediately.
